vocab.meaning: đảm nhận (trách nhiệm, công việc mới)
vocab.example: I often take on extra projects to broaden my skill set and contribute more to the team's success.

vocab.meaning: tiến hành, thực hiện (nhiệm vụ, nghiên cứu)
vocab.example: My primary role involves carrying out daily market analyses to provide data-driven insights for my manager.

vocab.meaning: vào cuộc, can thiệp (để giúp đỡ hoặc giải quyết vấn đề)
vocab.example: Whenever there is a technical crisis, I step in to mediate between the developers and the clients.

vocab.meaning: triển khai chi tiết, cụ thể hóa (một ý tưởng hoặc kế hoạch)
vocab.example: I’m responsible for taking rough concepts from the creative director and fleshing them out into full campaign proposals.

vocab.meaning: hoàn tất, giải quyết xong xuôi
vocab.example: Before I leave the office, I make sure all the administrative paperwork is squared away for the following day.

vocab.meaning: chuẩn bị sẵn sàng cho (một sự kiện, giai đoạn quan trọng)
vocab.example: At the moment, our department is gearing up for the annual audit, which requires meticulous preparation.

vocab.meaning: giao phó, ủy quyền cho cấp dưới
vocab.example: As a senior executive, I delegate routine administrative tasks to my assistants to focus on strategic planning.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt kịp thời, kiểm soát tốt tình hình
vocab.example: It is vital for me to stay on top of the latest industry trends to ensure our company remains competitive.

vocab.meaning: xoa dịu, dàn xếp (những tranh chấp, hiểu lầm)
vocab.example: One of my soft-skill responsibilities is to smooth over any internal frictions within the department.

vocab.meaning: mang lại, gây ra (sự thay đổi tích cực)
vocab.example: My job is to implement new workflows that will bring about greater efficiency across the entire organization.
